## Meeting Purpose

[Review an agent prototype and decide on GP's next project cycle focus.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GP's agent prototype is a success.** It validates using an MCP server and Atlas to orchestrate workflows, solving the critical problem of non-blocking execution that standard clients (e.g., ChatGPT) cannot handle.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**The top priority is fixing writing style.** Current prescriptive guidelines are failing clients by producing generic, inconsistent content. This issue is causing client churn and must be solved this cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**The solution is a new style system.** It will replace prescriptive rules with a "Memory Bank" of curated writing examples. An MVP will use a wizard to generate a dynamic, example-based style guide for each client.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4719.0)
  - [**GP will lead the writing style project.** This focus is a strategic shift from the broader agent prototype to deliver immediate business value. Panzer will provide content expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4764.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inconsistent Writing Style

  - [Current writing guidelines are failing clients, causing churn.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Prescriptive rules are rigid and don't adapt to context.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=3953.0)
      - [**Example (Biologica):** A rule to "quantify everything" is applied too broadly, making content sound salesy.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=3953.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a system that produces high-quality, on-brand content consistently, regardless of the writer or content type.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4154.0)

### Solution: Example-Based "Memory Bank" for Style

  - [The new system will replace prescriptive rules with a "Memory Bank" of curated examples.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4719.0)
  - [**Rationale:** LLMs excel at pattern matching. Providing good examples is more effective than giving abstract instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=3414.0)
  - [**MVP Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4925.0)
      - [**Wizard:** A new workspace setup wizard will generate a dynamic style guide.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4925.0)
      - [**Inputs:** The wizard will take reference articles from a client.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4925.0)
      - [**Output:** A "cheat sheet" of good/bad examples for specific content elements (e.g., intros, hooks, CTAs).](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4925.0)
      - [**Execution:** Drafting and post-processing agents will use this cheat sheet to enforce style.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4925.0)

### Prototype: Agent-Orchestrated Workflows

  - [GP's prototype validates the technical feasibility of an agent-driven experience.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**MCP Server:** Orchestrates workflows by communicating with both Flow and Output APIs.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Atlas Frontend:** Provides the UI, enabling custom notifications for long-running workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Key Achievement:** The prototype solves the "blocking chat" problem.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [Standard clients (ChatGPT, Claude) lack MCP subscription support, forcing users to wait for workflows to finish.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [Atlas enables custom notifications, allowing users to continue interacting while workflows run in the background.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Decision: GP's Next Cycle Focus

  - [GP's next cycle focus was decided by prioritizing the writing style problem.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4764.0)
  - [**Option 1 (Chosen):** Lead the writing style project, building the "Memory Bank" MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4764.0)
  - [**Option 2 (Deferred):** Continue the broader agent prototype.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [**Option 3 (Deferred):** Assist the Check That team.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GP:** Lead development of the writing style "Memory Bank" MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4764.0)
  - [**Panzer:** Provide content expertise for the style system.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=6108.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Continue research on agent architectures and context engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4050.0)
      - [Interview the former Jasper Head of AI for insights.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=4050.0)
      - [Direct the Check That team to prioritize the prompt screen and data table.](https://fathom.video/share/FVRNgZTszSezU6xs7KZjAsKYdzoi5rLz?tab=summary&timestamp=6226.0)
